description:
Create a WorkQueue type persisted at .ao/state/work-queue.json. This is the ordered list of task IDs the EM agent manages.

Fields: ordered entries with task_id, priority_override, reason (why it's in this position), queued_at timestamp, and status (queued/assigned/deferred).

Include load/save helpers in FileServiceHub following the atomic write pattern. The daemon scheduler reads from this queue instead of its own task picker when the queue is non-empty.
title: Add persistent work queue data model to .ao/ state
